title: youngia altaica
intro: Youngia altaica, also known as Khas or Korean wild celery, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Youngia altaica include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Asian medicine. Youngia altaica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking to add flavor and nutrition to various dishes.
